question: Will Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield compared to the 10-year Treasury yield have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-03-02?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/BAA10Y once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-03-02 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-02-20) was 1.440. (The latest value released in Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield Relative to Yield on 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity from the release Interest Rate Spreads.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: Series is calculated as the spread between Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond© (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DBAA) and 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity (BC_10YEAR).

Starting with the update on June 21, 2019, the Treasury bond data used in calculating interest rate spreads is obtained directly from the U.S. Treasury Department (https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/interest-rates/Pages/TextView.aspx?data=yield)..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Percent.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily
